data.title: iQIYI Charts New Course for the AI Era: Decentralized Content Model and Nadou Pro Launched at World Conference 2026
data.description: iQIYI has made a transition to a decentralized platform resembling social media, with broader access to intellectual property (IP), distribution, and revenue-sharing for creators. Nadou Pro has been introduced as a comprehensive AI-powered platform for professional content creation. Artificial intelligence is expediting content generation, with premium IP continuing to be a significant factor in driving value.

data.title: Applied Materials Announces Advantest as Innovation Partner for EPIC Platform in Silicon Valley
data.description: Applied Materials, Inc., a key player in materials engineering for the semiconductor sector, revealed today that Advantest Corporation (TSE: 6857), a prominent supplier of semiconductor test equipment, will be collaborating with them on their EPIC platform. This move aims to enhance the connections between front-end manufacturing technologies and back-end chip and package testing, ultimately speeding up the market release of new chip designs. As part of this partnership, Advantest has inaugurated an advanced Innovation Center on Applied Materials’ R&D campus in Silicon Valley, which will be closely integrated with Applied’s EPIC Center.

data.title: Advantest Announces Strategic Partnership with Applied Materials and Joins EPIC Platform
data.description: On April 21, 2026, Advantest Corporation, a prominent semiconductor test equipment supplier listed on TSE as 6857, revealed its participation in Applied Materials' cutting-edge EPIC (Equipment and Process Innovation and Commercialization) initiative in Sunnyvale, California. This collaboration marks a significant milestone as Advantest becomes the inaugural automated test equipment (ATE) company to engage with this platform. By teaming up with Applied, Advantest aims to enhance the connectivity between front-end manufacturing technologies and the posterior testing procedures for chips and packages, facilitating advancements in the semiconductor industry.
eQ Plc released their Q1 2026 interim report and announced a presentation on the results.

data.title: ACG METALS LIMITED: Q1 2026 Operations and Capital Structure Update
data.description: ACG Metals Limited (LSE: ACG) has reported on its successful performance and project advancement in the first quarter of 2026. The company highlighted a positive execution of operations and capital structure developments during this period. The update was released in London on April 21, 2026. A key takeaway from the first quarter was a notable decrease in lost time injury frequency, indicating improved safety measures and protocols within the company.

data.title: Klarrio Achieves ISO 27001 Certification for Third Year in a Row
data.description: Belgium-based company, Klarrio, specializing in scalable data platforms and services, has recently announced the renewal of its ISO 27001 Certification for 2026. This certification, considered the international benchmark for maintaining high standards in information security management systems (ISMS), was confirmed by DQS Belgium - an independent certification body. Following an audit earlier this year, Klarrio has successfully maintained ISO 27001 status for the third consecutive year. This achievement underscores the company's commitment to robust information security practices.

data.title: Triathlon Group: Geopolitical tensions reshape Swedish manufacturing despite strengthened outlook
data.description: In the year 2026, Swedish manufacturing firms are anticipating growth; however, escalating geopolitical tensions, trade tariffs, and heightened customer expectations are leading to a transformation in their operations. This shift is moving them towards favoring regional value chains over global ones.
